example_findings.description:
Detected a 2-hop attack path from aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block.public_bucket_block to aws_s3_bucket.public_bucket.

**Attack Chain:** public_bucket_block → public_bucket

Attacker enters via **aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block.public_bucket_block**
→ Traverses to **aws_s3_bucket.public_bucket** (accesses_bucket)
  ↳ S3 bucket publicly readable
  🎯 **HIGH-VALUE TARGET REACHED**

**Impact:** This could enable partial information disclosure or weaken the security posture.
example_findings.title: Attack Path: public_bucket_block → public_bucket

remediation_guidance: [aws_s3_bucket.public_bucket] Remove public ACL; use bucket policies for access control
Apply principle of least privilege across all connected resources.
Add monitoring and alerting for the identified attack path.
